allowed_claims: H-A2 can be weakened, falsified at proxy level, or prioritized for exact-data work.
This result may guide whether exact SPY 1-minute bar sourcing is worth revisiting.

big_day_dependency.reason: This proxy run does not create a new deployable return series. Exact big-day dependency remains required for future acceptance evidence.

coherence_assessment.interpretation: Risk-labeled macro/VIX days underperform non-risk days in both lower-resolution proxies and existing trade outcomes.

conclusion: ยังสรุปไม่ได้
conclusion_reason: The proxy and existing trade outcomes are directionally coherent with H-A2 risk-filter intuition, but the evidence is E1 only, under-sampled, and not an exact 2022 ORB test.
forbidden_claims: Do not claim exact 2022-10 ORB entries/exits were tested.
Do not claim E2 acceptance-grade edge.
Do not claim deployable strategy edge.
Do not approve paper trading or operational validation.
Do not treat 15-minute proxy evidence as exact 5-minute ORB evidence.
Do not request IBKR bars or buy new data from this preregistration alone.

methodology.decision_timestamp_policy: Prior-close VIX/VXV is used for ex-ante volatility labels. Scheduled same-day macro labels are treated as known before entry. Same-day post-entry market data is not used to define a filter.

exact_backtest.reason: Exact ORB entry timing, breakout ordering, stop/target path, and option fill timing require timestamp-aligned intraday bars and option quotes.
required_resolutions: SPY 1-minute bars for the exact tested date range
SPY 0DTE option bid/ask quotes at entry, exit checks, and forced close

mechanism_proxy.reason: The proxy question is whether opening follow-through and existing trade outcomes vary coherently by macro/VIX regime. A 5-minute bar can represent the 9:30-9:35 ET opening range, and a 15-minute bar can test a coarser opening-momentum proxy. Neither can prove exact 2022 ORB fills.

methodology.proxy_scope: Mechanism proxy only; not an exact 2022 ORB backtest and not deployable evidence.

next_safe_action: Keep H-A2 active and implement the exact-data prioritization decision only after reviewing whether the proxy result justifies a narrowly scoped 2022 underlying-bar source plan.

sample_policy.mintrl_psr_reason: The proxy rows are not treated as a deployable return series. Existing option outcomes remain under-sampled and must keep MinTRL/PSR labels from acceptance gates before any E2 claim.

tier_blockers: Existing option outcomes remain under-sampled and underpowered
No paper trading, operational validation, or real-money approval

trial_policy.dsr_reason: The run records all pre-registered proxy/regime trials, but it does not select a best Sharpe as acceptance evidence. DSR remains required for any future acceptance-grade Sharpe comparison.
